resources.string: No recovery key was saved for this vault. The encrypted files can\'t be opened on this device anymore. Reset to start fresh.
Enter your recovery key to restore access to %1$d folder(s). You\'ll confirm with your device once per folder.
Save a recovery key now, or accept that losing this device — or re-enrolling your fingerprint — permanently destroys the vault.
Skip — I accept lost device means lost vault
Write this down and store it off this device. It is the only way to recover the vault after a fingerprint re-enrollment. We cannot recover it for you.
I saved this key somewhere safe
To keep an off-device copy, use the recovery key above, or export a file and store the plain copy where you choose.
Add this file to the vault?

%1$s
%2$s · %3$s

Adding into folder: %4$s. The file is encrypted into the vault under this folder's master key.
Preview not available for this type — export to view externally.
This build won\'t run on this device.
